title: Air indicators - Canada.ca
content:
Air indicators allow for the continued tracking of progress on the release of pollutants, the effects those pollutants have on air quality, and how that affects health outcomes of Canadians.
- Air quality (updated January 2026)
- International comparison of urban air quality (updated December 2016)
- Air pollutant emissions (updated June 2025)
- Emissions of harmful substances to air (updated August 2025)
- International comparison: air pollutant emissions in selected countries (updated March 2024)

## Air pollution and health
- Air health trends (updated December 2022)
- Population exposure to outdoor air pollutants (updated February 2026)
Air pollutant emissions
- Volatile organic compounds
- Total particulate matter
- Respirable particulate matter
- Fine particulate matter

- Peak fine particulate matter

- Volatile organic compounds
